title: Classy Creepers [DEPRECATED]
description:
[DEPRECATED] Use the CEM resource pack instead.

A mod that makes every creeper much more classy.
body:
## Deprecation Notice

I have realized that having this as a separate mod just doesn't make sense and have since ported it into a resource pack that you can find here: [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classy-creepers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classy-creepers)

## Original Description

Ever wanted to have more classy creepers running around in your Minecraft world? Now you can!
